query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms IS NULL OR billingPlatforms = '[]' OR billingPlatforms = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_platforms,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%OneBill%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_onebill,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%SasBoss%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_sasboss,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%DataGate%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_datagate
FROM customers;

  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%OneBill%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_onebill,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%SasBoss%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_sasboss,
  SUM(CASE WHEN billingPlatforms LIKE '%DataGate%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_datagate
FROM customers;
